---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, docs, or install flow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why It Fits This Project

Explain why the change belongs in `learn-from-experience` rather than in a broader memory or telemetry system.

## Safety Considerations

Could this change affect transparency, privacy, or cross-session sync?

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or prior art.
